libhmm_model:
Hidden Markov Model parameters States: 2 Pi: [ 0.75 0.25 ] Transmission matrix: [ 0.875 0.125 ] [ 0.25 0.75 ] Emissions: State 0: Gaussian Distribution: μ (mean) = 0.000000 σ (std. deviation) = 1.000000 Mean = 0.000000 Variance = 1.000000
State 1: Gaussian Distribution: μ (mean) = 2.500000 σ (std. deviation) = 0.500000 Mean = 2.500000 Variance = 0.250000
